headline: How Investors Are Reacting To EMCOR Group (EME) Raising 2026 Guidance After Strong 2025 Results
summary: In late February 2026, EMCOR Group reported fourth-quarter 2025 sales of US$4,513.12 million and net income of US$434.61 million, with full-year 2025 sales reaching US$16.99 billion and net income of US$1.27 billion. The company also issued 2026 guidance calling for revenues between US$17.75 billion and US$18.50 billion and diluted EPS of US$27.25 to US$29.25, signaling management’s confidence in its earnings power after a strong 2025. With EMCOR raising its 2026 revenue and earnings...
